name: Old-Fashioned Chocolate Pudding Cake
recipeInstructions:
Recipe by: Sue Klapper
Preparation Time: 0:50
Heat oven to 350. In a medium bowl, stir together flour, sugar, cocoa, milk, baking powder, salt and vanilla. Spread into greased 8 inch square baking pan. In another medium bowl, stir together remaining cocoa, brown sugar and water. Pour over mixture in pan. Bake for 45 to 50 minutes or until pudding bubbles around edges. Remove from oven; let stand 20 minutes. Meanwhile, in a small bowl, stir jam until smooth. Drizzle each serving of warm pudding with jam.
